title: Dismiss The Prompt Alert
goal: Trigger the prompt alert on the DemoQA alerts page, dismiss it without entering text, and stop after the prompt event has been observed without a result being written to the page.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the prompt alert, dismiss it, and stop once the prompt was handled without any entered-text result appearing.
review_notes: Prompt-dismiss task on DemoQA using a transient dialog trace assertion plus a negative page-state assertion because prompt dismissal does not leave a visible result on the page.

success_assertions.value: dialog: prompt - Please enter your name

steps.explanation: I triggered the prompt alert and dismissed it without entering any text.

action.summary: I dismissed the prompt alert without entering any text, and the page did not show an entered-value result.

steps.explanation: The prompt was handled and no entered-text result appeared, so I am ending the task.
